chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2848 of 2020 And C.P.No.D-1237 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 27.01.2025 Mr.Jam Zeeshan, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P.No.D-2848/2020. Mr.Habib Qazi, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P.No.D-1237/2021 Mr.Anas Habib, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) Mr.Fawad Chandio, Advocate holding brief for Dr.Shahnawaz Memon, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Fahim Ali Memon, Advocate has filed separate Vakalatnama in both petitions on behalf of Respondent (F.B.R), which are taken on record. It is jointly submitted that the petitioners shall submit reply to the impugned show cause notices and the same shall be determined by the Department after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners. It is further stated that subject to pending aforesaid adjudication no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioners. Order accordingly. These petitions are disposed of as aforesaid. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
